creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
After having used "portsnap" to update the ports tree several times
over roughly 8 hours, I finally used it to install a fresh copy of the
ports tree, thereby effectively removing the old one. The new copy has
the correct "distfile" info. Apparently the original version I
downloaded had an incorrect "distfile". How or why that happened is
beyond my sphere of influence. Since I am not the only user who
reported this problem, I can safely say that it was not a local
phenomenon.

I believe this PR can now be closed.
